changeSet.author: system

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM currency_types WHERE id = 'a0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO currency_types (id, name, exchange_rate_to_gold, is_default) VALUES ('a0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', 'Gold', 1.0, true);

changeSet.author: system

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM currency_types WHERE id = 'a0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO currency_types (id, name, exchange_rate_to_gold, is_default) VALUES ('a0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', 'Silver', 0.1, false);

changeSet.author: system

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM currency_types WHERE id = 'a0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO currency_types (id, name, exchange_rate_to_gold, is_default) VALUES ('a0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', 'Copper', 0.01, false);
